findings.issue: The product clearly labels private beta as externally gated, but the repo still has no dated target-user usability smoke evidence. The stage table explicitly says real beginner usability still needs beta users, so a solo AI pass cannot prove that importers/exporters understand blockers, reports, or next valid moves.
findings.required_fix: Run a five-user private-beta usability smoke with beginner, importer, exporter, document-holding, and operator/reviewer tasks; record confusion, unsafe interpretations, task success, and P0/P1 fixes in a dated usability artifact.

proof_boundary: This is an AI-assisted simulated review. It can create fixes or blockers, but it cannot open qualified approval or launch gates.
